advice.summary: You are progressing well with your training, maintaining a good balance between running and strength workouts. Your recent sessions indicate a solid adherence to your training plan.
advice.focus: Incorporate more recovery runs to enhance endurance and prevent fatigue.
advice.nextSession: Plan a recovery run of 5-6 km at an easy pace to allow your body to recover while maintaining consistency.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during runs; ensure it stays within a safe range to avoid overtraining.
